description:
Add new fields to support materializer-based recovery:

RecoveryAttempt (lib/bedrock/control_plane/config/recovery_attempt.ex):
- metadata_materializer: pid() | nil
- shard_layout: %{end_key => {tag, start_key}}

TransactionSystemLayout (lib/bedrock/control_plane/config/transaction_system_layout.ex):
- metadata_materializer: process_ref() | nil
- shard_layout: %{Bedrock.key() => {tag, start_key}} | nil

Keep storage_teams: [] for backward compatibility (removed in bedrock-4jg9).
title: Update RecoveryAttempt and TSL data structures
